faq.description: Get practical information at a glance: access, schedule, workshops, and organization.

block1.title: What is MarsAI?
block1.text: A festival of 1-minute short films made with AI Free conferences and workshops Experience sharing with AI experts for professionals and the general public 2 days of festival in Marseille, at the heart of AI

block2.title: Festival objective
block2.text: Put people at the heart of creating AI-generated works Challenge participants' creativity through a very short format Leverage the power of AI around one theme: Imagine desirable futures

block3.title: Selection format
block3.text: 2-month open call 50 one-minute short films selected for the official competition Online distribution of works (web and social networks) Screenings in cinemas and film festivals

block4.title: Venue
block4.subtitle: La Plateforme
block4.text: 4,000 m2 of spaces in central Marseille to host the event

faq.informations-content: When and where does the MarsAi festival take place? The festival will take place over two days, Friday June 5 and Sunday June 7. The event takes place at the Dock des Suds (12 Rue Urbain V, 13002 Marseille). Doors open at 10:00 and close at 19:00.
faq.answer1-1: Public transport: Metro line 2 (Désirée Clary stop) or Tramway T2/T3 (Arenc Le Silo stop).
faq.answer1-2: By car: Public pay parking lots (Indigo Quai d'Arenc, Espercieux) are located in the immediate vicinity.
faq.answer1-3: Soft mobility: A parking area for bicycles and scooters is available on the forecourt.
faq.answer1-4: Is the site accessible to people with reduced mobility (PRM)? Yes, Dock des Suds is on one level and fully accessible. Adapted sanitary facilities are available within the building.
faq.question2: Do I need to buy or reserve a ticket?
faq.answer2: No, access to the MarsAi festival is entirely free and ticket-free. You can come at any time you like.
faq.answer3: Admission is free, but subject to the capacity of the Dock des Suds. In the event of very large crowds, a queue may be set up at the entrance for safety reasons.
faq.question4: Who is the MarsAi festival for?
faq.answer4: The festival has something for everyone! Whether you're a tech professional, a student, or simply curious to discover the latest advances in artificial intelligence, you'll find conferences and demonstrations adapted to your level.
faq.question5: Do I need to register in advance for the hands-on workshops?
faq.answer5: General admission is free, but some specific workshops require on-site registration at the festival reception on the day. Places are allocated on a first-come, first-served basis.
faq.disclaimer: The answer to your question may be found below!
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) - MarsAi Festival
